标题: Top 🛒🛒 Bottoms 🛒🛒 BURBERRY Equestrian Knight Logo Cotton Hoodie and Sweatpants Set, featuring a heavyweight fabric made of 16s double yarn face layer + 10s yarn base layer with a brushed fleece structure. The fabric surface is formed into a three-dimensional fleece texture by flipping the high-density loop layer outwards and precision brushing, giving a touch similar to touching baby camel hair, while maintaining a relatively smooth interior for easy wearing. The rugged texture of the double yarn ribbing matches perfectly with the heavy feel of the garment. The innovative Equestrian Knight logo combines fluffy embroidery with metallic thread embroidery: first, shaping the logo's fluffy soft three-dimensional texture with fluffy horsehair yarn through seed stitch and random stitch; then outlining the contours and armor details with coated metallic thread embroidery, adding a cold sheen on the fleece base. The tactile collision of warm fleece and cool metallic creates a whole new sensory experience for the classic pattern. Sizes: S-XL.

Burberry 2025 Fall/Winter new logo horse emblem letter embroidered washed water-resistant pants, with added fleece for extra warmth, vintage washed craftsmanship, custom fabric, straight-leg design, perfectly tailored cuffs, fully lined. Sizes: M-4XL.

Burberry checkered woolen shorts, made primarily of cotton with 6% polyester fiber and 2% elastic fiber blend. Cotton fiber is naturally skin-friendly, soft, and highly absorbent. The fabric's structure retains breathability, reducing stuffiness. The addition of a small amount of elastic and polyester fibers significantly enhances the fabric's stretch and resilience, while strengthening wrinkle resistance and shape retention, and reducing shrinkage. The checkered pattern creates a subtle embossed effect through variations in yarn color and weaving technique, providing a smooth texture with rich visual depth. The jacquard technique weaves the pattern into the fabric, ensuring colorfastness and durability even after repeated washing and wear. Careful tailoring of the crotch area, side pockets, and proportions ensures precise alignment of patterns and lines, enhancing overall coordination and aesthetics. Sizes: S-XL.

Burberry plaid belt shorts are made of single-sided fish scale fabric woven with cotton as the base. The front side features a smooth knit surface, while the inner side has a three-dimensional loop formed by the floating yarn weaving technique of the knitting machine, adding a fluffy feel and delicate touch. The loop structure has a high water absorption capacity and quick evaporation, making it resistant to loosening and deformation after multiple washes. The solid color embroidery on the back patch pocket is created using a computerized embroidery machine with high precision control of the head, needle bar, and thread spool, ensuring smooth and error-free stitching with a fine pattern accuracy of ±0.1mm. The fabric is evenly moistened with steam, then pressed with a heated roller and elastic rubber blanket to force fiber shrinkage, followed by cooling with cold air to set the shape. The shrinkage rate is controlled to be within 3%. Sizes: S-XL S: Length 51.5cm, Waist 78cm, Hip 106cm M: Length 53cm, Waist 84cm, Hip 112cm L: Length 54.5cm, Waist 90cm, Hip 118cm XL: Length 56cm, Waist 94cm, Hip 124cm.

Burberry 2025 Spring/Summer new classic checkered short-sleeve shirt and shorts set, made of fine Italian woven fabric, embellished with mother-of-pearl buttons. Mother-of-pearl is a type of mollusk found in the ocean with a hard shell, which is cleverly used to make buttons, not only durable but also possessing a natural beauty. It is an essential element in the production of high-end shirts. In the post-processing stage, the shirt will undergo ironing, shaping, and other treatments to ensure its smoothness and comfort. Additionally, the shirt will be cleaned and tidied to maintain its cleanliness and neatness. Sizes available: S-XL.

Burberry black and white linen pants, with different fabric compositions in black and white, please note the difference! This top luxury piece is full of sincerity. Simple yet stylish, these casual pants embody the perfect blend of casual and elegance. Available in classic black and soft beige colors, suitable for various styling occasions. The elastic waist with drawstring design allows for easy adjustment, catering to different body shapes and providing a comfortable experience. Side zip pockets add practicality while showcasing quality with exquisite details; delicate embroidery logo at the back pocket subtly reveals a unique identity. White version: made of 85% polyester and 15% linen blend, combining the crispness and wrinkle resistance of polyester with the breathability and skin-friendly nature of linen. Black version: crafted from a blend of 49% polyester, 41% viscose, 5% cupro, 2% nylon, and elastane, the fabric has a solid texture and drapes nicely. Whether strolling the streets or commuting to work, it effortlessly helps you create stylish looks, showcasing your attitude towards life in the details. Sizes available: 31-32-33-34-35-36.
